stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
An aircraft is planned to fly from Tashkent ('T', approximately 41ºN, 69ºE ) to Lusaka ('L', approximately 15°S, 28°E). The cruising FL increases from initially FL340 to FL450 halfway through the flight. What hazardous weather would you encounter en-route?

options.a: The pilot will NOT encounter icing during cruise flight.
options.b: The pilot will experience severe turbulence in the first 600 NM after the top of climb.
options.c: The pilot will encounter ice crystals during the whole flight.
options.d: The pilot will encounter ice crystals 600 NM before descent.
